name: frGetFrameCRC
title: frGetFrameCRC
description: This function returns the CRC of a received FlexRay frame.
The Header CRC can be determined with a special selector of the event procedure.

parameters.name: this
parameters.description: The function can only be used in the context of the following event procedures: on frRSlot on frFrame on frNullFrame on frFrameError this references the corresponding receive object in the event procedure.

description: The following example writes the CRC into the Write Window for all received frames.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
